occultReliquary.choose: Choose initial slot type for Occult Reliquary

oneTwoPunch.skip: Do not fight that enemy again

bloodRite.spendDamage: Spend Resource and Deal 1 Damage To Enemy At Your Location

callForBackup.rogue: {'{'}rogue{'}'} card, you may move to a connecting location
callForBackup.guardian: {'{'}guardian{'}'} card, deal 1 damage to an enemy at your location
callForBackup.seeker: {'{'}seeker{'}'} card, discover 1 clue at your location
callForBackup.mystic: {'{'}mystic{'}'} card, heal 1 horror from any card
callForBackup.survivor: {'{'}survivor{'}'} card, heal 1 damage from any card

friendsInLowPlaces.doNotSpend: Do not spend 1 resource to add a card to your hand
friendsInLowPlaces.versatileSkip: Do not add a card to your hand for free (Versatile)

glassing.discard: Discard Glassing to discover 1 additional clue

leadingLadyEnchantress.removeDoom: Remove 1 doom from a player card at your location

rightUnderTheirNoses.skip: Do not discover at connected location

salvage.remove: Remove that asset from the game and gain resources equal to its cost.

theRavenQuill.search: Search your deck, discard pile, and hand for a copy of a named asset and play it (paying its cost). Then, attach The Raven Quill to it.
theRavenQuill.deckbuilding: Either mark a checkbox on The Raven Quill's upgrade sheet, or reduce the experience cost to upgrade the attached asset before the next scenario by 1. (NOTE: you must handle this update manually when upgrading your deck via ArkhamDB)

trialByFire.all: Set the base value of each of your skills to 5
trialByFire.one: Set the base value of one of your skills to 7

atACrossroads.act: The chosen investigator must immediately take an action as if it were their turn, then discards 1 card at random from their hand.
atACrossroads.draw: The chosen investigator loses 1 action during their next turn, then draws 3 cards.

beguile.move: Move attached enemy to a revealed connecting location
beguile.investigate: Perform a basic investigate action at it's location
beguile.evade: Perform a basic evade action at it's location

blackMarket.missingOwner: A set aside card was missing its owner. Please select the correct owner

decoyTrap.discardMove: Discard Decoy Trap to move to its location

elaborateDistraction.evade: Automatically evade that enemy if it is not elite

ghastlyRevelation.giveClues: Give any number of your clues to another investigator
ghastlyRevelation.placeClues: Place any number of your clues on any location

honedInstinct.another: Perform another action and remove this from game (Force of Habit)

lieInWait.skip: Do not discard Lie in Wait
lieInWait.discard: Discard Lie in Wait to add +1 damage

manipulateDestiny.damage: Deal 2 damage to an enemy at your location
manipulateDestiny.heal: Heal 2 damage from an investigator or Ally asset at your location

mysteriesRemain.placeClue: Place 1 clue (from the token bank) on your location

predatorOrPrey.enemiesMove: Each unengaged enemy moves once toward the nearest investigator.
predatorOrPrey.investigatorsMove: Each investigator disengages from each enemy engaged with them and moves once away from the nearest enemy.

protectingTheAnirniq.return: Return that asset to its owner's hand

psychoanalysis.draw: Draw 1 revealed card and shuffle the rest into your deck
psychoanalysis.heal: Heal 2 horror and return revealed cards to top in any order

riteOfEquilibrium.add: Add X {'{'}curse{'}'} tokens to the chaos bag to add X {'{'}bless{'}'} tokens to the chaos bag.
riteOfEquilibrium.remove: Remove X {'{'}curse{'}'} and X {'{'}bless{'}'} tokens from the chaos bag to heal X total horror from among cards at your location.

taskForce.ability: ...resolve an {'{'}action{'}'} ability on an asset they control without paying its {'{'}action{'}'} cost.

throwTheBookAtThem.afterAttack: After the attack ends, you may resolve an {'{'}action{'}'} or {'{'}fast{'}'} ability on the chosen asset (ignoring its {'{'}action{'}'} cost, if any)

wordOfWeal.shuffle: Shuffle Word of Woe into your deck

wordOfWoe.shuffle: Shuffle Word of Weal into your deck

fickleFortune.place: Place 1 doom on the current agenda. Each investigator heals 3 damage and 3 horror.
fickleFortune.remove: Remove 1 doom from the current agenda. Each investigator takes 1 direct damage and 1 direct horror. Remove Fickle Fortune from the game.

onTheTrail.discoverBetween: Discover 1 clue at any empty location between you and the chosen enemy

searchForTheTruthAdvanced.place: Place that clue on your location and return any card from your discard pile to your hand

acridMiasma.hunter: Resolve the hunter keyword on each enemy in play

agathaCrane.cancel: Cancel this token and draw another. If you do, draw 1 card

buriedSecrets.takeHorror: Take 2 horror to shuffle into your deck

encephalonSignal.damage: Deal 2 damage to an investigator or Humanoid enemy at your location

agnesBakerParallel.shuffle: Shuffle event back in instead of discard?

beloved.remove: Remove Beloved from the game to replace that token's effects with the following: "You automatically succeed. (Do not reveal another token. Return this token to the chaos bag after this test ends)."

dianaStanley.doNotAdd: Do not add any cards to your Hand

ghastlyPossession.placeDoom: Place 1 doom on that asset. Ghastly Posession gains {'{'}wild{'}'}{'{'}wild{'}'}
ghastlyPossession.ifSuccess: If this test is successful, either remove 1 doom from that asset, or replenish half of its uses (rounded down)
ghastlyPossession.replenish: Replenish half of its uses (rounded down)

gloriaGoldberg.putOnTop: Put it on top of the encounter deck
gloriaGoldberg.placeBeneath: Place it beneath Gloria Goldberg (max 3 cards beneath her)
gloriaGoldberg.chooseDrawer: Choose investigator to draw encounter card

grimResolve.chooseHandCard: Choose hand card to swap with
grimResolve.chooseUnderCard: Choose card underneath to swap with

grizzled.addVictory: Add both the treachery and Grizzled to the victory display (Mythos-Hardened)

joeDiamond.chooseHunch: Choose 10 more cards for hunch deck

kohakuNarukami.removeAction: Remove 2 {'{'}bless{'}'} tokens and 2 {'{'}curse{'}'} tokens from the chaos bag to take an additional action this turn

mandyThompson.additionalTargets: Resolve 1 additional target of the search

memoriesOfAnotherLife.remove: Remove Memories of Another Life from the game
memoriesOfAnotherLife.skip: Do not remove Memories of Another Lift

minhThiPhan.skip: Do not choose a skill to return to your hand

nathanielCho.elderSign: {'{'}elderSign{'}'}: return an event from your discard pile to your hand.

outOfSight.disengage: Disengage from each enemy and move to a revealed location up to 2 connections away.

patriceHathaway.shuffle: Shuffle all but 1 card from your discard pile into your deck
patriceHathaway.leaveInDiscard: Choose 1 card to leave in discard

quickWitted.shuffle: Shuffle each other Quick-Witted in your discard pile into your deck

rexMurphyParallel.conversion: Number of times to use Rex's conversion

stellaClark.fail: Automatically fail this skill test to heal 1 damage and 1 horror

strokeOfLuck.exile: Exile Stroke of Luck to automatically succeed

subject5U21.doNotReturnDevoured: Do not return a devoured card

tommyMuldoon.moveToAsset: Move up to 2 damage and/or horror from Tommy Muldoon to an asset you control
tommyMuldoon.moveToTommy: Move up to 2 damage and/or horror from an asset you control to Tommy Muldoon
tommyMuldoon.doNotMove: Do not move any damage and/or horror

trishScarborough.discover: Discover 1 additional clue at that location
trishScarborough.doNotChooseLocation: Do not choose a different location

wendyAdamsParallel.sealOne: Seal 1 {'{'}bless{'}'} or {'{'}curse{'}'} token from the chaos bag
wendyAdamsParallel.sealAny: Seal any {'{'}bless{'}'} or {'{'}curse{'}'} tokens revealed from the chaos bag during this test

decoy.twoEnemies: {'{'}reaction{'}'}  When you play Decoy, increase its cost by 2: Change "a non-Elite enemy" to "up to 2 non-Elite enemies."
decoy.twoConnections: {'{'}reaction{'}'} When you play Decoy, increase its cost by 2: Change "at your location" to "at a location up to 2 connections away."

shortcut.ability: {'{'}fast{'}'} Exhaust Shortcut: _Move_ (to a connecting location). Any investigator at this location may trigger this ability.

thirdTimesACharm.cancel: Cancel it, return it to the chaos bag, and reveal a new chaos token
